title: Establish Backrest/restic restore gate
goal: Turn the existing restic installation into a verified backup/restore baseline and decide whether Backrest should be added as the local UI/orchestrator.

acceptance.assertion: Existing restic version, repositories, environment assumptions and exclude rules are documented without exposing secrets.
At least one snapshot target set is defined for repos, Bureau registry, Lenskit/RepoBrief artifacts and selected documents.
At least one single-file restore probe is executed or explicitly blocked with the missing prerequisite recorded.
Backrest, if added, is bound only to localhost or Tailnet and does not expose repository credentials in logs or repo files.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
